meta.purpose: Strategic and environmental context shaping AI platform decisions.

environment.state: Emerging AI maturity, fragmented implementations, strong governance requirements
environment.challenge: Align governance, runtime, and data into a cohesive enterprise AI platform

platform_model.PATH: Target-state AI control plane (governance + execution patterns)

strategic_context.risk: Lack of convergence architecture between PATH and HAIL
strategic_context.objective: Unify PATH and HAIL into a coherent enterprise AI platform model

strategic_objectives: Establish enterprise AI platform across HC/PHAC
Enable governed, auditable AI execution at scale
Align AI architecture to ADM accountability under TBS policy
Reduce duplication and fragmentation across AI initiatives
current_priorities: Align PATH (governance layer) and HAIL (runtime layer)
Develop AI capability models and enterprise heatmaps
Build unified enterprise AI + data platform narrative
Support ADM understanding of AI responsibilities
Strengthen ARB positioning for AI governance decisions
Integrate data and AI into a cohesive operating model
